_comment: Fixed v10-vs-v11 benchmark set. 'pdf' is rendered without annots for YOLO; 'truth' is the same Bluebeam-marked PDF, annotation layer = ground truth. split: held-out = NOT in v13 training (real generalization signal); in-sample = v13 training data (measures fit on corrections, esp. AD-GRD vs AD-T-BAR).
